zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Knightley於大約1365年出生在英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾時，他的父親Sir John Knightley22歲，母親Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster34歲。他於1399年之後與Katherine結婚。他去世於1442年12月19日在英國諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利享年78歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Knightley was born about 1365, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, his father, Sir John Knightley, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster, was 34. He married Katherine after 1399. He died on 19 December 1442, in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Knightley est né environ 1365, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Knightley, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Katherine après 1399. Il est décédé le 19 décembre 1442, à Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Knightleyが約1365年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルで生まれた時，父Sir John Knightleyは22歳，母Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulsterは34歳であった。1399年以後にKatherineと結婚した。彼は1442年12月19日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアファウスリーで78歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアファウスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Knightley(이)가 대략 1365년 영국 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Knightley(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1399년 이후 Katherine(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1442년 12월 19일 영국 노르섬프토실르 파슬리에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 파슬리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Knightley родился около 1365 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Knightley было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Burgh 4th Countess of Ulster, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine после 1399 г. Он умер 19 декабря 1442 г. в местности фавсли, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности фавсли, нортамптоншир, Англия.
